readability.explanation: The adapted text is slightly less readable than the original text due to the removal of the 👍 emoji, but it is still understandable.

meaning.explanation: The adapted text conveys the same message as the original text, emphasizing the difference between societal expectations and personal fulfillment.

hallucinations.explanation: The adapted text does not contain any new information that was not present in the original text.
